overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian night market. The scene transitions from a covered walkway with green metal roofing through a traditional Japanese-style gate illuminated with cyan and red neon lights, into a bustling market interior with digital billboards, parked vehicles, and street food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with green metal roofing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market walkway beneath green metal roofing

entered.detail: corrugated green metal roofing covering the walkway
tall vertical banners with Asian characters hanging from ceiling
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the structure
fabric awnings covering various market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered market walkway with green metal roofing and concrete pillars. Vertical advertising banners hang overhead, and market stalls line the right side. The lighting is artificial and green-tinted, with sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approach to traditional neon-lit gate

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with visible red neon lighting ahead
ambient lighting shifts from green to dominant red and cyan neon illumination

agents.ego_description: approaching the illuminated traditional gate structure with neon accents

entered.detail: traditional Asian architectural gate structure with ornate roofing
bright cyan neon strips outlining the gate entrance
intense red neon illumination above and around the gate
metal barrels with open fires providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway onto an open street, approaching a traditional Japanese-style gate illuminated with vibrant cyan and red neon lights. Burning barrels line the right side, and the atmosphere shifts from green artificial light to intense neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market area with traditional gate entrance

events.description: passes through the traditional gate into the covered market interior
navigates around parked van and market stall tables

agents.ego_description: moving through the gate into the market interior, navigating between stalls and groups of NPCs

notable_agents.action: standing near food stall table, facing the vendor
group of characters conversing near the red van

entered.detail: red commercial van parked along the right side with open side door
wooden tables with various items and equipment for food vending
large illuminated advertising screens showing character portraits
industrial metal racks holding various goods and containers

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate, the character enters a covered market area with moderate crowds. A red delivery van is parked on the right, while food stall tables occupy the left. Digital billboards glow in the background, and NPCs stand in groups conversing or browsing goods.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with digital advertising screens

events.description: approaches food stall with intensely glowing red grill, lighting becomes predominantly red
vendor at grill temporarily blocks view of background while character passes close by

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall to observe the vendor cooking at the glowing red grill, moving slowly through the narrow space

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing white tank top tending to the glowing red grill, cooking food with visible steam

entered.detail: large commercial grill with intense red neon lighting and visible steam rising
metal counter with food preparation items and glowing elements

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the market, approaching a food stall with a prominently glowing red grill. A vendor tends to the cooking equipment while digital billboards illuminate the background. The space becomes narrower and more enclosed, with the red grill casting intense light on the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian night market that transforms from a dim, industrial walkway into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial hub. It begins beneath a green metal roof and concrete pillars, moving past hanging advertising banners and quiet stalls under a green-tinted artificial glow. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene shifts toward a traditional Japanese-style gate where the lighting transitions into intense cyan and red neon, flanked by burning barrels. Passing through the gate, the environment opens into a bustling market interior filled with digital billboards, parked delivery vans, and groups of conversing pedestrians. The camera finally pushes deeper into the narrowing space, moving toward a food stall where a glowing red grill casts a sharp, intense light over the surrounding vendors and equipment.
